content: Nikola Grubor is a PhD student of Bioinformatics at the Belgrade Medical School Institute for Medical Statistics and Bioinformatics. His research interests include Bayesian Modeling, Pancreatic Oncology and Replication Research. He is currently completing his internship at the Clinical Centre of Serbia.

title: Nikola Grubor, MD
